name: asiai
description: Apple Silicon LLM inference benchmark and monitoring CLI. Detects installed engines, benchmarks local models, recommends configurations by hardware, and exposes an MCP server.

skills.name: detect-engines
skills.description: Auto-detect installed LLM inference engines (Ollama, LM Studio, mlx-lm, llama.cpp, vLLM-MLX, Exo, TurboQuant) via a 3-layer cascade: persistent config, port scan, process detection.

skills.name: list-models
skills.description: List loaded models across all engines with specs (engine, name, VRAM, quantization, context length).

skills.name: monitor-inference
skills.description: Monitor system and inference metrics with watch mode, historical queries, and analysis of memory pressure, thermal, GPU, engine state.

skills.name: benchmark-models
skills.description: Run rigorous performance benchmark of one or more models across engines. Measures tok/s, TTFT (client + server), VRAM peak, power draw (PowerMetrics), thermal behavior. Supports single-model, engine comparison, and cross-model comparison with statistical stability (CI 95%, P50/P90/P99).
skills.invoke: asiai bench [--model M] [--compare A B] [--engines ollama,lmstudio] [--runs 3] [--power] [--card]

skills.name: diagnose-system
skills.description: Run comprehensive diagnostics on asiai installation and system (Apple Silicon compat, engines reachability, storage DB integrity, daemon state, alerting config).

skills.name: manage-daemon
skills.description: Install, start, stop, and inspect background services (metrics collector, web dashboard) as macOS LaunchAgents.

skills.name: tui-dashboard
skills.description: Interactive text user interface dashboard (Textual) for real-time inference monitoring.

skills.name: web-dashboard
skills.description: Launch a local web dashboard (FastAPI + htmx) to monitor inference in real time at http://localhost:8642.

skills.name: run-mcp-server
skills.description: Start the MCP server exposing 11 read-only tools and 3 resources to AI agents (Claude Code, Claude Desktop, etc.) over stdio/SSE/streamable-HTTP. See mcp-server.json for the server card.

skills.name: community-leaderboard
skills.description: Display the community benchmark leaderboard (shared benchmarks from other Apple Silicon Macs). Filter by chip and model.

skills.name: compare-to-community
skills.description: Compare your local benchmarks against the community database (median, P90, outliers per chip+model+engine tuple).

skills.name: recommend-config
skills.description: Hardware-aware engine and model recommendations for this Mac. Optimizes for throughput, latency, or efficiency (tok/s/W). Uses scoring matrix across 8 engines.

skills.name: setup-wizard
skills.description: Interactive first-launch setup wizard: detects engines, configures persistent settings, optionally registers as an agent.

skills.name: manage-config
skills.description: Manage persistent engine configuration (add, remove, show, reset). Persisted under ~/.config/asiai/engines.json.

skills.name: show-version
skills.description: Show asiai version, hardware context (chip, RAM), detected engines, daemon status.

skills.name: unregister-agent
skills.description: Remove the local agent registration (delete stored X-Agent-Id and X-Agent-Token credentials). Used to opt out of community agent registry.
